results.title: Microsoft, Meta, and Google just announced billions more in AI spending. Only Google convinced investors it's paying off. | Fortune
Google wraps up best month since 2004 as earnings push Alphabet stock up 34% in April
Meta Competitors: META Top Rivals in 2026 | Hudson Labs
Amazon vs. Meta: Which Stock Will Win Over the Next Decade? - 24/7 Wall St.
Meta just bumped its 2026 capex forecast up to as much as $145 billion—and investors flinched | Fortune

summary: Alphabet (Google) up 34% in April after earnings; Google Cloud revenue +63% YoY to $20B, convincing investors AI capex pays off. Microsoft, Amazon similarly investing heavily but have cloud businesses proving ROI. Meta's lack of a cloud business makes its AI capex ROI harder to demonstrate versus peers. Snap competes directly on social apps. Amazon vs. Meta long-term comparison trending in financial media.
